title: i just watched directors cut episode 24 for the first time
display_title: i just watched directors cut episode 24 for the first time
wikitext:
[]: i just watched director's cut episode 24 for the first time.             Quote Post by duexmachina » Mon Dec 07, 2009 5:30 am you know the introduction of our handsome friend kaworu ...and seriously wtf. kaworu has a horrible VA in this, why did they go around thinking it was okay to change kaworu's voice and just downgrading him .seele is just as bad.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Mon Dec 07, 2009 5:43 am Watch it in Japanese, solve all your problems.

[]:             Quote Post by duexmachina » Mon Dec 07, 2009 5:50 am the thing is i got so use to kaworu's voice anything else will seem wrong.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Dec 07, 2009 7:25 am I didn't like Kaworu's original voice. I originally heard the DC voice first(Greg Ayres) and when I heard the voice from the originally aired episode later on(Kyle Sturdivant) it was like nails on a chalkboard as soon as I heard it. It didn't bother me during later viewings but I still prefer Ayres performance. So I think it's a case of which one you hear first probably.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Dec 07, 2009 9:17 am Fazmotron wrote: Watch it in Japanese, solve all your problems.

[]: Re: i just watched director's cut episode 24 for the first t             Quote Post by Synapsid » Mon Dec 07, 2009 12:09 pm duexmachina wrote: ...and seriously wtf. kaworu has a horrible VA in this...

[]:             Quote Post by Kamina » Mon Dec 07, 2009 2:06 pm They couldn't get all the same actors since they did the dub years after the original dub in a different state. I always watch the directors cut in Japanese otherwise i get really ticked off fast.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Dec 07, 2009 3:01 pm Kamina wrote: They couldn't get all the same actors since they did the dub years after the original dub in a different state. I always watch the directors cut in Japanese otherwise i get really ticked off fast.

[]:             Quote Post by Ambrosia » Mon Dec 07, 2009 5:21 pm Fazmotron wrote: Watch it in Japanese, solve all your problems.

[]:             Quote Post by Dr. Webster » Mon Dec 07, 2009 8:21 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: It should also be noted that some voice actors were not welcome back, and some wanted nothing to do with ADV.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Mon Dec 07, 2009 9:47 pm As a sidenote, if fattie Matt Greenfield can't even properly handle a little argument with some no name actor (or even rehire the same 8 or 10 no name actors for a redub) how is he supposed to handle producing a $100 million + feature during a period of harsh economic recession (which we might start seeing hit the movies). Oh, and yeah, just watch it in Japanese and save yourself the trouble.

[]:             Quote Post by duexmachina » Tue Dec 08, 2009 4:24 am i suppose the sub will never let me down.

[]:             Quote Post by Hatsumi92 » Tue Dec 08, 2009 5:07 am I've never actually watched the sub of Evangelion. I've seen clips of it and random scene's of 1.0 in Japanese but i've never been much of a sub fan if there's a dub i could watch. But on topic. I don't think there is anything wrong with Kaworu's voice in both DC and original TV airing. But that's just what i think. It really does depend on who you hear first. To me they both have their charms. oh and can anyone explain to me that drama with ADV?

[]:             Quote Post by VoidEater » Wed Dec 09, 2009 12:40 pm There are different voice actors? <ducks>

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Wed Dec 09, 2009 1:00 pm i've been meaning to get around watching it subbed, but I so far haven't done so perhaps when I re-watch the series again (Which will be soon), i'll watch it subbed

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Dec 09, 2009 1:48 pm GasmaskAvenger wrote: perhaps when I re-watch the series again (Which will be soon), i'll watch it subbed

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Wed Dec 09, 2009 3:39 pm Dr. Webster wrote: I find it really interesting that Tristan MacAvery still hasn't played Gendo again, even though Eva has been in the hands of two different companies after ADV (Mangle and Funi). His spat with Matt Greenfield must have turned him off to the entire franchise.

[]:             Quote Post by Dr. Webster » Wed Dec 09, 2009 6:53 pm Hatsumi92 wrote: oh and can anyone explain to me that drama with ADV?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Dec 09, 2009 7:08 pm Hatsumi92 wrote: But that's just what i think. It really does depend on who you hear first. To me they both have their charms.

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Sat Dec 12, 2009 2:54 pm I really liked greg ayres as kaworu... he does a good job as the voice of aida in rebuild too. The original actor for kaworu was ok. But i really didnt like Kaji's va as kaworu. He just sounded like a gay Kaji lol
